text: We got more bubbles. Another bubble monkey. Yay! You like it? Oh! She loved that first one. Oh, she has two of them now. Bubbles, huh? We'll do bubbles when daddy gets up, okay? Hey, cheese. I love it. Look at my bubbles. I'm not happy now. Well, get your money now, she's on. Yeah, you want these ones? Put them on. I'll put this one on. Okay, princess.
